Note: this version extracts firstName as the word after ", " in column 7, distinct from firstNameCount logic in v1-v3 which used everything before the first comma as the key, hence different top_first_name result (JOHN vs SMITH).

pread+work-stealing 128MB chunks, zero-alloc parse (IndexByte), arena hash table; I/O-bound at ~1.55GB/s vs 1.71GB/s raw disk. mmap variant tried first: 6.5s at 108% CPU (macOS serializes parallel page faults). Hardware: Apple M2 (4P+4E cores), 16GB RAM, SSD raw seq read 1.71GB/s (dd bs=8m)
